ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_systems" (
  "size_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size system */,
  "size_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the size system (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size system */,
  "default_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Default measurement unit for the size system (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of product (e.g., t-shirts, jeans) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the product (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart used for the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the product (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the product (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart used for the product */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit for the size (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "product_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alt text for the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_descriptions" (
  "product_description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product description */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product description was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product description was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_descriptions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "product_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review left by the customer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "product_variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., color, size) */,
  "variant_value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., red, blue, S, M) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product variant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variant_values" (
  "product_variant_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant value */,
  "product_variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variant */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., red, blue, S, M) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product variant value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product variant value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_variant_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variant_values_product_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("product_variant_id")
)
